data.title: Rocket Lab Expands NASA Partnership With Neutron Under VADR Contract
data.description: Rocket Lab partners with NASA to launch Neutron rocket under existing contract, expanding capabilities for missions and long-term goals.

data.title: Starbucks Faces 34 New Union Complaints Amid Rising Tensions with Workers
data.description: Starbucks has dismissed the allegations as unfounded.

data.title: US May Add Fewer Jobs In December With An Unchanged Unemployment Rate, Predict Economists
data.description: Economists expect December's non-farm payrolls to soften in jobs report to be released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.

data.title: Tesla Launches Refreshed Model Y In China Amid Rising Competition
data.description: Tesla has launched a refreshed version of its Model Y SUV in China, in a bid to refresh its aging vehicle amid rising competition.

data.title: Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin Pushes New Glenn Launch To No Earlier Than Sunday Due To Adverse Weather Conditions
data.description: Jeff Bezos‘ Blue Origin said that the company has postponed the first launch of its New Glenn rocket to orbit to no earlier than Jan. 12.
